title: Meltwater API Schemas
description: JSON Schema definitions extracted from the Meltwater API OpenAPI specification

date.title: An ISO8601 date, excluding time and timezone/offset.
date.description:
An ISO8601 date, excluding time and timezone/offset.

The year, month and day formatted according to ISO8601. The date
represents the local date at the timezone given in the `tz` parameter.

timestamp.title: An ISO8601 date-time.
timestamp.description:
An ISO8601 date-time, including timezone offset.

The timezone offset is an offset in minutes from UTC.

created_at.title: An ISO8601 date-time.
created_at.description:
An ISO8601 date-time, including timezone offset.

The timezone offset is an offset in minutes from UTC.

message.description: A message describing, in brief, the problem.

start_date.description:
Start date (UTC) in ISO 8601 Local standard.
E.g. "2024-03-25T00:00:00"

end_date.description:
End date (UTC) in ISO 8601 Local standard.
E.g. "2024-03-30T00:00:00"

languages.description:
The languages of documents to include in the query.

A primary language subtag from the IANA language tag registry, 'zh-Hant',
'zh-Hans' or 'zz'.

In addition to two and three letter primary subtags from the
[IANA language tag registry](https://www.w3.org/International/articles/language-tags/#language),
the following special language codes are also supported:

  * `zh-Hans` - for Simplified Chinese
  * `zh-Hant` - for Traditional Chinese
  * `zz` - for unknown language

This restricts the documents queried to include only those in a
particular language.

If multiple languages are specified, documents in any of those languages
will be included in the results.

countries.description:
The origin countries of documents to include in the query.

The two-letter ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 country code, or 'ZZ'.

Besides the two letter [ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2 country code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code/)
of a country, 'ZZ' may be used to indicate 'Unknown country of origin'.

This restricts the documents queried to include only those that
originated from a particular country.

If multiple countries are specified, documents that originated from any
of those countries will be included in results.

Documents that originated in some countries may be restricted from your
queries automatically, based on your jurisdiction and entitlements.

sources.description:
The origin sources of documents to include in the query. This restrictsthe documents queried to include only those that originated from these selected sources.

If multiple sources are selected, documents from any of those sources will be included in the results.

*Available values*: forums, blogs, douyin, sina_weibo, twitch, facebook, wechat, news, pinterest,x, instagram, little_red_book, bilibili, youku, kakotalk, broadcast and linevoom.

sentiments.description:
The overall sentiment of the document to filter on.

If multiple sentiments are specified, documents that match any of the sentiments will be included in the results.

*Available values*: positive, negative and neutral.

keywords.description: List of keywords to filter documents by.

emojis.description: List of emojis to filter documents by.

custom_categories.description: List of custom category IDs to filter documents by.

filter_set.description: ID of a filter set to apply.

author_lists.description: List of author list IDs to filter documents by.

type.description: The type of analytic to query with.

dimension.description: The dimension to use in a `top_terms` or `count_unique` analytic type. Use the `GET v3/analytics/custom/catalog` endpoint to see what dimensions are available.

limit.description: The limit to the number of terms to return in a `top_terms` analytic type.

measures.description: The measures to use in a `measures_statistics` analytic type. Use the `GET v3/analytics/custom/catalog` endpoint to see what measures are available.

granularity.description: The granularity to use in a `date_histogram` analytic type.

end_date.description: End date used in the request

languages.description: Language filters used in the request

countries.description: Country filters used in the request

sources.description: Source filters used in the request

sentiments.description: Sentiment filters used in the request

search_id.description: Saved Search ID used in the request

document_count.description: Total number of documents that matched the search and filters
Number of documents that are contained in either the `date_histogram` or `top_terms` bucket

percentage.description: Percentage of documents compared to the parent bucket. If the analysis has no parent, then the percentage is calculated from the total document count.

label.description: Some dimensions will include extra enriched information when used in a `top_terms` analytic type

change.description: Change in number of documents from the previous date histogram timeseries bucket

analysis.description: Any nested analysis is contained in the buckets of the parent analysis

oneOf.description: For analytic types (eg. `count_unique`) that don't involve buckets or statistic breakdowns, only the result is returned.

dimensions.description: All dimensions able to be used in `top_terms` and `count_unique` analytics

measures.description: All measures able to be used in `measure_statistics` analytics

types.description: All analytic types that can be used

errors.details: Temporarily unable to handle the request, try again later

Whether to include selected custom categories as filters

window_weekday.description: An integer representation of what day of the week the export window starts. Integer values are: Monday=1, Tuesday=2, Wednesday=3, Thursday=4, Friday=5, Saturday=6, Sunday=7 Defaults to 1

window_time_unit.description: Window Time Unit. The time unit the export window represents. Defaults to "DAY"

window_time.description: Window Time. The time of day the export window begins. Defaults to "00:00:00"

window_size.description: Window size. The number of 'window_time_unit's the export window covers. Defaults to 1

window_monthday.description: An integer representation of what day of the month the export window starts. Integer values 1-28 represent the day of the month e.g. 1 represents 1st, 2 represents the 2nd, etc. Integer value 0 represents the last day of the month. Defaults to 1

updated_at.description: The datetime the export was last updated

timezone.description: Timezone for window_time field. Must be a valid timezone in the IANA database. Defaults to "Etc/UTC"
